---
title: "Course Dashboard"
---

```{=html}
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>

<style>
  .auth-warning {
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
    border: 1px dashed white;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 8px 12px;
    margin-top: 10px;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    display: none;
  }
</style>

<div class="global-progress-banner">
  <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start mb-2 flex-wrap gap-2">
    <div>
      <h2 id="gp-headline" style="margin-bottom: 2px; font-weight: 800;">Your Progress</h2>
      <div id="gp-subtext" style="opacity:0.85;font-size:0.95rem;">Loading…</div>
    </div>
    
    <div id="auth-status"></div>
  </div>

  <div id="guest-warning" class="auth-warning">
    ⚠️ <strong>Note:</strong> You are not logged in. Progress is only saved locally on this device and may be lost.
  </div>
  
  <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 mt-3">
    <div class="progress" style="height:22px; flex-grow: 1; background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);">
      <div id="global-progress-bar" class="progress-bar" role="progressbar"
           style="width:0%;background-color:#a8d5a2;color:#1a4d1a;font-weight:900;border-radius:50px;"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:2.4rem;font-weight:900;opacity:0.9; line-height: 1;" id="gp-percent-badge">0%</div>
  </div>
</div>

<h3 style="color:#1a4d1a;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:1.2rem;margin-top:2rem;">Course Content</h3>
<div class="grid" id="week-cards-grid" style="align-items: stretch;"></div>

<script>
// 1. INITIALISIERUNG
const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://hpyezixseggwnrpepbhx.supabase.co';
const SUPABASE_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImhweWV6aXhzZWdnd25ycGVwYmh4Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzY4MTUzMDgsImV4cCI6MjA5MjM5MTMwOH0.HGcrv7-I07yFES2qBRhXf1j3UCbfMb8PwlWkQjY6NYs';
const sbClient = supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_KEY);

sbClient.auth.onAuthStateChange(async (event, session) => {
  console.log('Auth event:', event, session?.user?.email);
  if (event === 'SIGNED_IN' || event === 'TOKEN_REFRESHED') {
    if (window.location.hash.includes('access_token')) {
      window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, window.location.pathname);
    }
    await render(); // ganze Seite neu rendern mit eingeloggtem User
  }
  if (event === 'SIGNED_OUT') {
    await render();
  }
});

const WEEKS = [
  {
    n: 1,
    title:  "Week 1: Basic Data Structures",
    topics: "Syntax · Variables · Vectors · Matrices · Lists · Dataframes",
    href:   "1_datentypen.html",
    chunkCount: 20,
    quizIds: ["w1_q_vectors","w1_q_matrices","w1_q_lists","w1_q_dataframes"]
  },
  { n:2,  title:"Week 2: Datatypes",            topics:"Factors · Discrete vs. Continuous · Type Coercion",    locked:true },
  { n:3,  title:"Week 3: Data Import & Export",  topics:"CSV · Excel · RData · Working Directory",              locked:true },
  { n:4,  title:"Week 4: Data Manipulation",     topics:"dplyr / pandas · filter · mutate · group_by",          locked:true },
  { n:5,  title:"Week 5: Visualisation I",       topics:"ggplot2 / matplotlib · Scatter · Histogram · Boxplot", locked:true },
  { n:6,  title:"Week 6: Visualisation II",      topics:"Heatmaps · PCA plots · Multi-panel figures",           locked:true },
  { n:7,  title:"Week 7: Statistics I",          topics:"Distributions · t-test · Wilcoxon · Normality",        locked:true },
  { n:8,  title:"Week 8: Statistics II",         topics:"ANOVA · Correlation · Multiple Testing",               locked:true },
  { n:9,  title:"Week 9: String & Regex",        topics:"grep · gsub · stringr · Regular Expressions",          locked:true },
  { n:10, title:"Week 10: Functions & Loops",    topics:"for · apply / map · Custom Functions",                 locked:true },
  { n:11, title:"Week 11: Bioinformatics I",     topics:"Bioconductor · GEO · DESeq2 basics",                   locked:true },
  { n:12, title:"Week 12: Bioinformatics II",    topics:"RNA-seq pipeline · Enrichment Analysis",               locked:true }
];

// 2. AUTH UI
async function updateAuthUI(user) {
  const container = document.getElementById('auth-status');
  const warning = document.getElementById('guest-warning');
  
  if (user) {
    warning.style.display = 'none';
    container.innerHTML = `
      <button onclick="sbLogout()" class="btn btn-sm" 
        style="background-color: white; color: #1a4d1a; border: 2px solid white; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 800; padding: 5px 20px;">
        LOGOUT
      </button>`;
  } else {
    warning.style.display = 'block';
    container.innerHTML = `
      <button onclick="sbLogin()" class="btn btn-sm" 
        style="background-color: #1a4d1a; color: white; border: 2px solid white; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 800; padding: 5px 20px;">
        LOGIN
      </button>`;
  }
}

// Login via Magic Link
async function sbLogin() {
  const email = prompt("Enter your email to sync your progress:");
  if (!email) return;
  const { error } = await sbClient.auth.signInWithOtp({ 
    email: email,
    options: { emailRedirectTo: window.location.href }
  });
  if (error) alert("Error: " + error.message);
  else alert("Magic Link sent! Check your email.");
}

async function sbLogout() {
  await sbClient.auth.signOut();
  localStorage.clear();
  window.location.reload();
}

// 3. DATEN LOGIK
function getLang() {
  try { return localStorage.getItem('da_course_lang') || 'python'; } catch(e){ return 'python'; }
}

async function fetchAllProgress(user) {
  if (!user) return null;
  const { data, error } = await sbClient
    .from('progress') 
    .select('key, value')
    .eq('user_email', user.email);

  if (error) return null;
  
  return data.reduce((acc, row) => {
    acc[row.key] = row.value === 'true';
    return acc;
  }, {});
}

function calculateWeekProgress(week, dbData) {
  if (!week.chunkCount) return null;
  const lang = getLang();
  const total = week.chunkCount + (week.quizIds ? week.quizIds.length : 0);
  let done = 0;

  const isItemDone = (id) => {
    if (dbData) return dbData[id] === true;
    try { return localStorage.getItem(id) === 'true'; } catch(e) { return false; }
  };

  for (let i = 1; i <= week.chunkCount; i++) {
    if (isItemDone(`chunk_${lang}_w${week.n}_c${i}`)) done++;
  }
  (week.quizIds || []).forEach(qid => {
    if (isItemDone(`quiz_${lang}_w${week.n}_${qid}`)) done++;
  });
  return { done, total, pct: Math.round((done / total) * 100) };
}

function statusLabel(p, locked) {
  if (locked) return '🔒 Locked';
  if (!p) return '📋 No exercises yet';
  if (p.pct === 100) return '✅ Completed';
  if (p.done > 0) return '🔄 In progress — ' + p.done + '/' + p.total + ' done';
  return '⬜ Not started';
}

// 4. RENDER
async function render() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('week-cards-grid');
  const { data: { user } } = await sbClient.auth.getUser();
  await updateAuthUI(user);

  const dbData = await fetchAllProgress(user);
  grid.innerHTML = '';
  let totalAll = 0, doneAll = 0, completedW = 0;

  WEEKS.forEach(week => {
    const p = calculateWeekProgress(week, dbData);
    if (p) {
      totalAll += p.total;
      doneAll += p.done;
      if (p.pct === 100) completedW++;
    }

    const col = document.createElement('div');
    col.className = 'g-col-12 g-col-sm-6 g-col-md-4';

    const isLocked = week.locked;
    const card = document.createElement(isLocked ? 'div' : 'a');
    card.className = 'week-card p-4' + (isLocked ? ' opacity-50' : '');
    if (!isLocked && week.href) {
      card.href = week.href;
      card.style.textDecoration = 'none';
    }

    const pct = p ? p.pct : 0;
    card.innerHTML = `
      <div class="week-card-title">${week.title}</div>
      <div class="week-card-topics">${week.topics}</div>
      <div class="week-card-status">${statusLabel(p, isLocked)}</div>
      ${p ? `
        <div class="week-card-progress-bar-bg mt-2">
          <div class="week-card-progress-fill" style="width:${pct}%"></div>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:0.73rem;color:#6c757d;margin-top:4px;">${pct}% complete</div>
      ` : ''}
    `;
    col.appendChild(card);
    grid.appendChild(col);
  });

  const gPct = totalAll > 0 ? Math.round((doneAll / totalAll) * 100) : 0;
  document.getElementById('global-progress-bar').style.width = gPct + '%';
  document.getElementById('global-progress-bar').innerText = gPct > 8 ? gPct + '%' : '';
  document.getElementById('gp-percent-badge').innerText = gPct + '%';
  
  const activeW = WEEKS.filter(w => !w.locked && w.chunkCount).length;
  document.getElementById('gp-subtext').innerText = 
    `${completedW} of ${activeW} weeks completed · ${getLang().toUpperCase()} mode`;
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async () => {
  // Kurz warten damit Supabase den Token aus dem Hash verarbeiten kann
  await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500));
  await render();
});
</script>
```
